data/maps/OldaleTown_Mart/text.inc.OldaleTown_Mart_Text_PokeBallsAreSoldOut: The clerk says they're all sold out.\nI can't buy any POKé BALLS.
data/maps/OldaleTown_Mart/text.inc.OldaleTown_Mart_Text_ImGoingToBuyPokeBal: I'm going to buy a bunch of POKé BALLS\nand catch a bunch of POKéMON!
data/maps/OldaleTown_Mart/text.inc.OldaleTown_Mart_Text_RestoreHPWithPotion: If a POKéMON gets hurt and loses its HP\nand faints, it won't be able to battle.\pTo prevent your POKéMON from fainting,\nrestore its HP with a POTION.
